questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Apples are Fruits.
2. All Fruits are Foods.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: Who wrote the national anthem of India?
Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 49, 64, 122, 36
questions.explanation: 36, 49, and 64 are perfect squares. 122 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 42, 44, 46, 48, 50?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 5, 10, 20, 40, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 2. So, 40 * 2 = 80.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 52 days while B can complete the same work in 120 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 52 * 120 = 6240. Rate = 52 + 120 = 172. Time = Work / Rate = 36.28 days.

questions.question: Who was the first President of India?
Which is the longest river in the world?
Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Find the next number in the series: 7, 13, 19, 25, 31, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 6. So, 31 + (6) = 37.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 6000 at an interest rate of 6% per annum over 5 years?
A train travels at an average speed of 90 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 3 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.
